ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of the store (e.g., Urban, Suburban, Rural) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager assigned to the store */,
  "store_open_date" TEXT /* The date when the store opened */,
  "store_close_date" TEXT /* The date when the store closed (if applicable) */,
  "store_area_sqft" REAL /* The area of the store in square feet */,
  "last_audited_date" TEXT /* The date of the last store audit */,
  "latitude" REAL /* The latitude of the store location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* The longitude of the store location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* The date the manager was hired */,
  "date_left" TEXT /* The date the manager left (if applicable) */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* A rating of the manager's performance */,
  "department_head_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the department head (if the manager is also a department head) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_managers_department_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_head_id") REFERENCES heads ("head_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store the department is in */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_id" INTEGER /* ID of the head assigned to the department */,
  "department_open_date" TEXT /* The date when the department was opened */,
  "department_close_date" TEXT /* The date when the department was closed (if applicable) */,
  "department_area_sqft" REAL /* The area of the department in square feet */,
  "last_inventory_check_date" TEXT /* The date of the last inventory check for the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_head_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_id") REFERENCES heads ("head_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heads" (
  "head_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each head */,
  "head_name" TEXT /* Full name of the head */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the head */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the head */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* The date the head was hired */,
  "date_left" TEXT /* The date the head left (if applicable) */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* A rating of the head's performance */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the manager overseeing the head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("head_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heads_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "sales_date" TEXT /* Date of the sales record */,
  "weekly_sales" REAL /* Weekly sales amount */,
  "is_holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the date is a holiday */,
  "temperature_c" REAL /* Average temperature in Celsius */,
  "fuel_price_usd_per_l" REAL /* Fuel price in USD per liter */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* The ID of any promotion running during the sales period */,
  "customer_segment" TEXT /* The segment of customers contributing to the sales */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* The total discount amount applied during the sales period */,
  "net_sales" REAL /* The net sales amount after discounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "holiday_date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "holiday_type" TEXT /* The type of holiday (e.g., national, local) */,
  "is_public_holiday" INTEGER /* A boolean indicating if the holiday is a public holiday */,
  "holiday_description" TEXT /* A description of the holiday */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather record */,
  "temperature_c" REAL /* Average temperature in Celsius */,
  "precipitation_mm" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "wind_speed_kmph" REAL /* The average wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "cloud_cover_percentage" REAL /* The percentage of cloud cover */,
  "weather_description" TEXT /* A description of the weather conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_prices" (
  "fuel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel price record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the fuel price record */,
  "fuel_price_usd_per_l" REAL /* Fuel price in USD per liter */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* The type of fuel (e.g., diesel, gasoline) */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the fuel price data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_prices_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the economic indicator record */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate */,
  "consumer_confidence" REAL /* Consumer confidence index */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate */,
  "cpi" REAL /* Consumer Price Index */,
  "unemployment_rate_change" REAL /* The change in the unemployment rate from the previous period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory update */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* The level at which the inventory should be reordered */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* The quantity to reorder when the inventory level reaches the reorder level */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* The date of the last reorder */,
  "next_reorder_date" TEXT /* The date of the next expected reorder */,
  "lead_time_days" INTEGER /* The lead time in days for the product to arrive after reordering */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* The level at which the product should be reordered */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* The quantity to reorder when the product level reaches the reorder level */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* The date of the last reorder */,
  "next_reorder_date" TEXT /* The date of the next expected reorder */,
  "lead_time_days" INTEGER /* The lead time in days for the product to arrive after reordering */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* A description of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* The URL of the product image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "contact_person_name" TEXT /* The name of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_person_email" TEXT /* The email of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "contact_person_phone" TEXT /* The phone number of the contact person at the supplier */,
  "last_order_date" TEXT /* The date of the last order from the supplier */,
  "next_order_date" TEXT /* The date of the next expected order from the supplier */,
  "lead_time_days" INTEGER /* The lead time in days for the supplier to deliver after an order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
